features: ULTIMATE CARE ACTIVE WASH: Refresh your post-workout or morning routine with our specially designed pH-balanced formula to gently cleanse & deodorise intimate areas every day. With 6 x 250ml bottles

PH BALANCED: Won’t dry out or irritate delicate feminine skin like soap can. With multi-actif complex charged with silver-ions technology, ginseng extract & antioxidants to keep intimate skin hydrated
FRESHER FOR LONGER: Each soothing body wash’s caring formula is designed to help ‘downstairs’ feel fresh for up to 12 hours. Rinse thoroughly with warm water - for external use only
DERMATOLOGICALLY & GYNAECOLOGICALLY TESTED: Gentle on delicate, intimate areas. Hypoallergenic - suitable for sensitive skin. Hormone free, paraben free, soap free & pH balanced
PART OF THE FEMFRESH SKIN CARE RANGE: Ideal for daily use. Specifically designed to care for your delicate vulval skin & intimate female areas, keeping you feeling fresher for longer
description: Product Description Stay confident and refreshed every day with Femfresh Ultimate Care Wash. This bottle of daily intimate goodness keeps you feeling super-chilled, refreshed and energised for up to 12 hours. The feminine body Wash is charged with silver-ion technology, ginseng extract and antioxidants; the ultimate multi-actif complex, to hydrate your intimate skin and give you that super fresh feeling all-day long. The pH-balanced formula is dermatologically and gynaecologically tested. It's also hypoallergenic and 100% soap free so it's gentle enough to use daily, every morning, or after a workout. Ideal for use on your vaginal and vulval areas, Femfresh is specially designed to help maintain a healthy natural pH balance – to help reduce irritation and prevent itching and discomfort. Includes 6 x 250ml bottles to keep you feeling refreshed for longer. • Femfresh Ultimate Care Vaginal Wash – 6 x 250ml bottle multi pack • Multi-actif purifying complex gives you a shower-fresh feeling for longer • With silver-ions & natural ginseng extract • pH balanced, soap free & fragrance free • Suitable for everyday use • Hypoallergenic • Dermatologically & gynaecologically tested • Simply later up & rinse thoroughly with warm water Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Glycol Distearate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Triethyl Citrate, Parfum, Glycerin, Laureth-4, Polyquaternium-39, Dichlorobenzyl Alcohol, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract, Hamamelis Virginiana Leaf Extract, Panax Ginseng Root Extract, Citric Acid (and) Silver Citrate, 2-Bromo-2-Nitropropane-1,3-Diol, Sodium Benzoate, Lactic Acid, Sodium Lactate, Citrus Aurantium Fruit Extract, Sodium Carbonate, Sodium Hydroxide. Part of the Femfresh range. All products are specifically designed to care for women’s delicate vulval areas. Our intimate washes are pH-balanced and specifically designed for use on your intimate skin, so you can choose the perfect feminine wash to suit you! Ingredients Antioxidants
